positive: A stylized, maximalist illustration of interconnected celestial elements forming a cosmic forest. The primary elements include bioluminescent flora, abstract nebula structures, and crystalline geometric planetary bodies intertwined with the silhouettes of mythic, winged creatures. Composition should be centered, highly symmetric, and visually dense, with strong contrasting areas of deep indigo, cosmic teal, vibrant gold leaf accents, and electric lavender. Use linework and flat color blocking reminiscent of modern Art Deco and psychedelic poster art. Ideal for printing on apparel, ensuring clean lines and solid color patches for maximum contrast and graphic impact. Vector illustration quality, high detail.
